chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No.D-6341 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Priority 1. For order son office objection 2. For hearing of Misc. No.27593 of 2018 3. For hearing of main case 14.10.2024 Mr. Asad Aftab, Advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Zubair, Advocate for the Petitioner Dr. Shah Nawaz Memon, Advocate for the Respondents Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General, Pakistan ************ Through this petition, the petitioner has challenged the detention of its vehicle; however, after filing of this petition, it has transpired that Order-in-Original No.503/2018-19 dated 03.12.2018 has been passed, whereby, it has been directed that the vehicle be released of the petitioner. It is the case of the Respondents’ Department that such order has been challenged before the Customs Appellate Tribunal and Appeal bearing No.K-173 / 2019 is pending. In view of the above, this petition is disposed of along with listed application by directing the Tribunal to decide the above appeal, preferably within a period of thirty days from today, after affording an opportunity of being heard to all concerned. Let a copy of this order be communicated to Customs Appellate Tribunal for compliance. Petition stands disposed of in these terms. JUDGE JUDGE Qurban/PA*
